name: Grok 4
description: xAI's most powerful model with superior reasoning, real-time knowledge, native tool use, and strong coding capabilities. Known for being helpful, truthful, and less censored.

name: Claude Opus 4.6
description: Anthropic's flagship model excelling in deep reasoning, writing, and complex task automation. Preferred by many for high-quality, safe, and thoughtful outputs.

name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
description: Google DeepMind's advanced multimodal model with excellent reasoning, speed, and value. Strong in science, long-context processing, and creative tasks.

name: GPT-5.4
description: OpenAI's latest flagship model. Excellent all-rounder with broad ecosystem support, strong agentic abilities, and seamless tool use.

name: Meta AI
description: Meta's powerful AI assistant powered by the latest Llama models. Available across Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook, and Ray-Ban Meta glasses with strong multimodal capabilities.

name: DeepSeek V3.2
description: Highly efficient and cost-effective open model from China, competitive with top closed models especially in coding and math.

name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
description: The faster and more accessible version of Claude 4 family. Great balance of speed, quality, and cost for everyday professional use.

name: Qwen3-Max
description: Alibaba's strong contender, especially good for multilingual tasks and closing the gap with Western frontier models.
